name: Nutty Wheat Bread
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Firmly packed light brown sugar
recipeInstructions:
1. Coat a 9-x5-x3-inch loaf pan with cooking spray and set aside.
2. In a large bowl, combine flour and the next six ingredients: raisins, walnuts, brown sugar, baking soda, salt, and egg beaters. Make a well in the center of the mixture.
3. In a separate bowl, whisk together buttermilk and vegetable oil until blended.
4. Add the wet ingredients to the dry ingredients and stir just until moistened.
5. Pour the batter into the prepared pan.
6. Bake at 350 degrees F (175 degrees C) for 55 minutes or until a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out clean.
7. Let cool in the pan for 10 minutes, then remove from the pan and let cool completely on a wire rack.
Yield: 1 loaf (157 calories per serving).
